title: A Dark Legend Takes Shape
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Loki as Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.
scene: Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it looks like they're about to get me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'll kill teach and commit suicide!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll survive this by splitting up!! Let's meet on Lulsia, XEBC!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Finally ditched your wife and kid, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Now then, what'll the next attack be?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why am I the one being saved here?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 'FRAID I CAN'T LET YA GO ANY FURTHER!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A model of the fishy-fishly fruit!! I'll feed it to Katakuri!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My future crew's gonna be over- wheningly powerful!!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Violent Past through 18 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
